warrior.name: Warrior
warrior.description: A fearless frontline fighter specializing in raw power and defense.
warrior.lore: Forged in the crucible of the Grudge Wars, Warriors are the backbone of any warband. Their strength and endurance are unmatched on the battlefield.

abilities.name: Slash
abilities.description: A steady sword strike that restores resources

abilities.name: Power Strike
abilities.description: A devastating blow dealing 2x damage

abilities.name: War Cry
abilities.description: Boost your damage by 30% for 3 turns

abilities.name: Shield Bash
abilities.description: Stun the enemy for 1 turn

abilities.name: Cleave
abilities.description: Slash deep, hitting all enemies and causing bleed for 3 turns

abilities.name: Demon Blade
abilities.description: Transform into a Demon Swordsman for 3 turns, gaining +40% damage and +15 defense

signatureAbility.name: Invincible
signatureAbility.description: Become invulnerable for 2 turns, absorbing all damage

mage.name: Mage Priest
mage.description: Master of arcane magic and divine healing arts.
mage.lore: Drawing power from ancient ley lines and forgotten gods, Mage Priests wield destructive magic alongside sacred healing — a balance few can master.

abilities.name: Arcane Bolt
abilities.description: A focused arcane pulse that restores resources

abilities.name: Fireball
abilities.description: Hurls fire dealing massive damage + burn

abilities.name: Divine Heal
abilities.description: Restore 30% of max HP

abilities.name: Ice Storm
abilities.description: Freezes all enemies, reducing their damage

signatureAbility.name: Mana Shield
signatureAbility.description: Convert mana into a protective barrier

worge.name: Worge
worge.description: A shapeshifter who wields nature and storm magic in human form, then transforms into a devastating beast.
worge.lore: Worges walk between worlds — scholars of storm and root in mortal guise, unstoppable predators in beast form. Their mace and dagger channel primal energies until the wild within is unleashed.

abilities.name: Mace Strike
abilities.description: A storm-charged mace blow that restores resources

abilities.name: Lightning Lash
abilities.description: Call down a bolt of lightning on the target

abilities.name: Nature's Grasp
abilities.description: Vines heal you over 3 turns

abilities.name: Dagger Toss
abilities.description: Hurl an envenomed dagger, poisoning for 3 turns

abilities.name: Heal Totem
abilities.description: Summon a totem that heals allies when you act

abilities.name: Fire Totem
abilities.description: Summon a totem that attacks enemies when you act

abilities.name: Fear Totem
abilities.description: Summon a totem that slows enemies and may cause them to skip attacks

abilities.name: Call Leaf Sprite
abilities.description: Summon a nature spirit that heals allies and poisons foes

abilities.name: Call War Imp
abilities.description: Summon a vicious imp that attacks enemies with fire

abilities.name: Call Twig Guardian
abilities.description: Summon a bark guardian that taunts enemies and retaliates

signatureAbility.name: Worge Transform
signatureAbility.description: Transform into a ferocious beast, boosting damage and defense. Use again to revert.

ranger.name: Ranger
ranger.description: A deadly marksman with precise long-range attacks.
ranger.lore: Silent and patient, Rangers strike from the shadows with lethal precision. Their arrows find gaps in even the thickest armor.

abilities.name: Quick Shot
abilities.description: A swift arrow that restores resources

abilities.name: Aimed Shot
abilities.description: A carefully aimed shot that always crits

abilities.name: Poison Arrow
abilities.description: Poisons the enemy for damage over time

abilities.name: Evasive Roll
abilities.description: Increase evasion by 50% for 2 turns

abilities.name: Arrow Volley
abilities.description: Rain arrows on all enemies for heavy damage

signatureAbility.name: Focus
signatureAbility.description: Passive: +10% crit per turn (max 5 stacks). Critting spends stacks. Active: Double stacks and guarantee next crit.
